subcodes.first_line: Thou hast indeed attained unto the presence, hearkened unto the Call, and quaffed the choice wine of utterance from the hands of bounty and bestowal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فزت بالحضور و سمعت الندآء و شربت رحیق البیان من ایادی الفضل و العطاء ان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
